caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain black background, appearing to speak directly to the camera. She wears a light green, short-sleeved tunic adorned with red and white floral embroidery along the neckline. A small black clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her collar, and she wears a dark necklace. A gold logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom-left corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the woman's facial expressions shift slightly; she begins with her eyes partially closed and her mouth open, then opens her eyes and continues speaking with varied lip movements and subtle tilts of her head. The background remains static, and the camera angle is a consistent medium close-up throughout the sequence.
